title: centaurea phlomoides
intro: Centaurea phlomoides, also known as Mountain Bladder Campion, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve respiratory issues. Its leaves and flowers contain flavonoids and other compounds that contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions. Centaurea phlomoides can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
